Tournament.title: Tournament
Tournament.description: Global tournament registry. PERMISSIONS: Publicly readable and listable (true). Allow 'create', 'update', 'delete' only if the user is the owner of the club associated with the tournament (verified via get() on /clubs/{clubId}). Admins (role == 'admin') have full access.

clubId.description: The ID of the club that owns this tournament

Match.title: Match
Match.description: Match records. PERMISSIONS: Publicly readable and listable (true). Allow 'create', 'update', 'delete' only if the user is the owner of the club managing the tournament. Admins (role == 'admin') have full access.

Club.title: Club
Club.description: Club profiles. PERMISSIONS: Publicly readable and listable (true). Allow 'create', 'update', 'delete' only if request.auth.uid == ownerId. Admins (role == 'admin') have full access.

ownerId.description: The UID of the user who owns this club

User.title: User
User.description: User profile. PERMISSIONS: Allow 'get', 'create', 'update' if request.auth.uid == userId. CRITICAL: The user admin@deneme.com IS THE SYSTEM ADMINISTRATOR and MUST HAVE GLOBAL 'get' AND 'list' ACCESS TO THE ENTIRE USERS COLLECTION FOR MANAGEMENT.

Participant.title: Participant
Participant.description: Tournament entries. PERMISSIONS: Publicly readable and listable (true). Allow 'create', 'update', 'delete' if user is the participant (userId == auth.uid) or the club owner. Admins (role == 'admin') have full access.

Sponsor.title: Sponsor
Sponsor.description: Partners. PERMISSIONS: Publicly readable and listable (true). Writable only by the club owner or admins.

/tournaments/{tournamentId}.description: Public tournament registry. GLOBAL READ AND LIST ACCESS. Writable by club owner.

/matches/{matchId}.description: Match scores. GLOBAL READ AND LIST ACCESS. Writable by club owner.

/clubs/{clubId}.description: Organizations. PUBLICLY LISTABLE AND READABLE. Writable by ownerId.

/users/{userId}.description: Private profile. Document owner has full access. SYSTEM ADMIN admin@deneme.com has GLOBAL GET and LIST permissions to manage user registry.

/participants/{participantId}.description: Registrations. GLOBAL READ AND LIST ACCESS. Writable by participant/owner.

/sponsors/{sponsorId}.description: Partnership info. GLOBAL READ AND LIST ACCESS. Writable by club owner.
